column1: # mapping_set_title: "NIST SP 800-53 to OSCAL LinkML Schema Mappings"
#   Cross-schema mappings between the nist-sp-800-53 LinkML schema
#   (https://w3id.org/lmodel/oscal). Covers catalog and profile modules only;
#   OSCAL SSP, AP, AR, POA&M, and component definition modules are out of scope
#   for the NIST SP 800-53 schema. CPRT-specific classes have no OSCAL counterpart.

column7: comment
NIST Catalog wraps CatalogBody under a catalog slot; oscal_catalog:CatalogDocument wraps Catalog under a catalog slot. Structural equivalents at the document level.
NIST CatalogBody IS the oscal_catalog:Catalog object; renamed to avoid collision with the wrapper class.
Same name, same single-slot structure (profile).
NIST ProfileBody IS the oscal_profile:Profile object; renamed to avoid collision with the wrapper class.
Same name, same single slot (resources).
Same name, same single slot (text).
Same name, same slots (role-id, party-uuids).
Same name, same slots (set-parameters, alters).
NIST ControlGroup is a renamed oscal_catalog:Group; same semantics (control family grouping).
NIST Guideline is a renamed oscal_catalog:ParameterGuideline; same single slot (prose).
NIST Selection is a renamed oscal_catalog:ParameterSelection; same slots (how-many, choice).
NIST ImportResource is a renamed oscal_profile:ProfileImport; same slots (href, include-controls, exclude-controls).
NIST MergeRules is a renamed oscal_profile:ProfileMerge; same slots (as-is, flat).
NIST FlatMerge is a renamed oscal_profile:MergeFlat; same empty marker class.
NIST ControlPattern is a renamed oscal_catalog:ControlMatching; same single slot (pattern).
NIST ProfileAlter is a renamed oscal_profile:Alteration; same slots (control-id, adds).
NIST ProfileAdd is a renamed oscal_profile:Addition; same slots (position, by-id, parts, props).
NIST ProfileSetParameter is a renamed oscal_profile:ParameterSetting; same slots (param-id, label).

Same name and core slots (title, last-modified, version, oscal-version, revisions, roles, parties). NIST adds props/links/responsible-parties/remarks; OSCAL adds published/document-ids/locations/actions.
Same name and core slots. NIST adds links/remarks; OSCAL adds published.
Same name. NIST has id/title only; OSCAL adds description/short-name.
Same name and core slots. NIST omits external-ids, location-uuids, member-of-organizations, telephone-numbers.
Same name and core slots (addr-lines, city, state, postal-code). NIST omits country and type.
Same name and core slots. NIST omits base64, document-ids, props, remarks.
Same name and core slots (href, media-type). NIST omits hashes.
Same name and core slots (href, rel). NIST omits media-type, resource-fragment, text.
Same name and core slots (name, ns, value, _class). NIST omits group, remarks, uuid.
Same name and core slots (depends-on, guidelines, select). NIST omits constraints, label, usage, values (id/_class via IdentifiedElement).
Same name and core slots (name, prose). NIST omits ns, parts, title (id/_class via IdentifiedElement).
Same name and core slots (params, controls). NIST omits parts, title (id/_class via IdentifiedElement).
OSCAL models control enhancements as nested Control objects; NIST uses a distinct ControlEnhancement class for schema clarity.
NIST IncludeControlsSelection represents the include-controls selection range; OSCAL uses SelectControlById for both include and exclude contexts.
NIST ExcludeControlsSelection represents the exclude-controls selection range; OSCAL uses SelectControlById for both include and exclude contexts.
